overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing an NCPD officer character walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit city street at night. The character explores the sidewalk, crosses a street, and is struck by a vehicle, with the camera following the action in third-person perspective.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk with food stalls and vending machines

agents.ego_description: NCPD officer walking steadily along the covered sidewalk, passing food stalls and utility boxes while holding a rifle

entered.detail: large red vertical banner with white HASAMI text hanging from building facade
cluster of grey electrical utility boxes against teal building wall
wooden food stall with counter and stools under covered walkway
futuristic vending machine with glowing interface against the wall
striped metal barrier blocking off construction or restricted area

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following an NCPD officer walking along a rain-slicked covered sidewalk. The environment features cyberpunk aesthetics with teal walls, red banners, and wet concrete reflecting green neon lights. The character moves past various street elements including vending machines and food stalls while remaining under the sheltered walkway.

events.description: character steps from covered sidewalk onto open street crosswalk, exposing view to sky and wider intersection
character stops at the corner and stands still, observing the intersection while holding weapon at ready

agents.ego_description: character stops at the street corner, standing guard while looking around the wet intersection

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on wet asphalt
tall traffic signal with red lights visible against the night sky
modern building front with large glass windows and green neon reflections
green metal railing separating sidewalk from street level

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the covered walkway onto a wide-open intersection with prominent yellow crosswalk stripes. Standing at the corner, the officer pauses to observe the surroundings while rain continues to fall on the wet asphalt. The scene reveals more of the urban environment with traffic signals and glass building facades illuminated by neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with moving traffic and food vendors

events.description: character turns around and begins walking back toward the original sidewalk, reversing direction
white car strikes the character at the crosswalk, sending them to the ground

agents.ego_description: character walks back across the street toward the camera, weapon held at hip level, before being hit by a vehicle

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving down the wet street that collides with the character at the crosswalk
person with red umbrella and purple backpack walking along the opposite sidewalk

entered.detail: white sedan vehicle that enters frame and strikes the character
large red industrial barrel sitting on the sidewalk corner
distant pedestrian carrying a red umbrella walking past food stalls

segments.scene_description: The character reverses direction and walks back toward the camera, passing the food stall area again. A pedestrian with a red umbrella appears in the background. Suddenly, a white car enters the frame and strikes the character at the crosswalk, causing the camera to shake and fall. The segment ends with the character on the ground and the car passing by.

events.description: camera drops to ground level showing the crosswalk from the asphalt perspective after character is hit
perspective shifts to follow the character running across the street in the distance, then transitions to following on foot

agents.ego_description: character recovers and runs across the street, then continues walking along the sidewalk exploring the area

entered.detail: building entrance with glowing red and purple neon signage reading FOODCAFE
green metal pipe railing running along the edge of the elevated sidewalk
second vending machine with illuminated product display on the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: Following the collision, the camera rests at ground level showing the wet crosswalk markings before the perspective shifts to follow the character running across the street. The character continues walking along the opposite sidewalk, passing by a food cafe with red neon signage and another vending machine, maintaining a steady pace through the rain-soaked cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked cyberpunk district that shifts from a sheltered walkway to a chaotic street intersection and finally to a distant sidewalk. It begins by trailing an NCPD officer along a covered sidewalk where teal walls and red banners reflect green neon lights off the wet concrete. As the character moves forward, the scene opens up into a wide intersection with yellow crosswalk stripes and towering glass facades illuminated by the city's glow. The camera then reverses direction as the officer walks back toward the food stalls, only for the perspective to shake and drop to ground level when a white car suddenly strikes the character. Finally, the view recovers from the wet asphalt to follow the character as they regain their footing and continue walking along the opposite sidewalk past red neon cafe signage and vending machines.
